items.title: We released Crystal 1.19.1 to fix a regression in absolute to relative conversions of timers that affected some targets.
items.content: We released Crystal 1.19.1 to fix a regression in absolute to relative conversions of timers that affected some targets.

items.title: What about a shiny Crystal 1.19.0 release for the new year?
items.content:
What about a shiny Crystal 1.19.0 release for the new year?

The compiler now uses execution contexts and parallel LLVM codegen on all targets (including Windows) a new Time::Instant type, compile time flags with values, and many runtime improvements and fixes.
